extracted_clauses:
TERMINATION
This Service Agreement may be terminated by either party with 30 days written notice.

SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENT
The Contractor guarantees 99.9% uptime for all services.
Response time for critical issues: within 1 hour.
Scheduled maintenance windows require 48 hours notice.
